* Passive RC low-pass filter
Vin in 0 AC 1
Rs in out 1k
Rload out 0 100k
C out 0 350n
.ac lin 2000 10 20000
.meas ac gain_200Hz_mag FIND v(out) AT=200
.meas ac gain_2kHz_mag FIND v(out) AT=2000
.control
run
.endc
.end

criteria_results.rationale: The passband edge at 200 Hz must remain close to the expected cutoff behavior.

best_candidate.raw_text:
* L-Network Impedance Match
V1 src 0 ac 1
Rs src in 50
L1 in out 13.78uH
C1 out 0 1.378nF
Rload out 0 200
.ac dec 100 500k 1.5MEG
.meas ac zin_mag FIND mag(v(in)/(-i(V1))) AT=1e6
.meas ac zin_real FIND real(v(in)/(-i(V1))) AT=1e6
.meas ac zin_imag FIND imag(v(in)/(-i(V1))) AT=1e6
.end

errors: Error: no data saved for A.C. Small signal analysis; analysis not run

criteria_results.rationale: The real part of the input impedance should remain close to the desired 50-ohm match.
The real part of the input impedance should remain close to the desired 50-ohm match.
The input impedance should be approximately real at the target frequency.
The input impedance should be approximately real at the target frequency.
The reflection coefficient magnitude must remain small enough to indicate acceptable matching.

decision.label: FAIL
decision.reason: Sanity checks reported issues and simulation did not complete successfully.

best_candidate.raw_text:
* RC Snubber Circuit
V1 in 0 DC 24V
Rs in sw 0.1
.model SWMOD SW(Ron=1m Roff=1Meg Vt=0.5 Vh=0)
Vpulse ctrl 0 PULSE(0 1 0 1u 1u 1m 2m)
S1 in sw ctrl 0 SWMOD
Rload sw n1 2
Lload n1 0 10mH
Cpar sw 0 50pF
Rsnub sw snub_mid 10
Cs snub_mid 0 10nF
.tran 0.1u 3m UIC
.meas tran vpeak_switch MAX v(sw) FROM=0.9m TO=3m
.meas tran snubber_energy INTEG (v(sw)-v(snub_mid))*i(Cs) FROM=0.9m TO=3m
.meas tran settling_proxy MAX v(sw) FROM=1.5m TO=3m
.end

errors: Error: measure  snubber_energy  integ(TRIG) : no such vector as '(v(sw)-v(snub_mid))*i(cs)'

criteria_results.rationale: The peak switching-node voltage must remain below the over-voltage limit.
The energy dissipated by the snubber must remain within an acceptable passive-loss budget.
Late-time residual over-voltage should remain limited, indicating acceptable damping of the transient.

decision.label: FAIL
decision.reason: Simulation failed or did not run successfully.
